meta.purpose: Legacy-only interaction inventory baseline BEFORE React migration
notes: readinessPass=false is EXPECTED on Legacy: duplicate View Details cannot form unique ready-target selectors; most hooks missing-stable-target.
Inventory mapper stableSelector does not treat data-studio-appointment-view-details as unique (and 4 matches would fail uniqueness).
Post-React: re-run map; require readinessPass=true for primary CTAs; reconcile every removed/renamed target — unexplained loss blocks PAGE FINAL PASS.

steps: Save React map beside this baseline with dated filename
Diff totals + named CTAs: View Details / Edit / Cancel / Ask Site Pilot / Discuss with Site Pilot / Load more / breadcrumbs / appointment title links
Require readinessPass=true for primary Studio hooks (prefer unique data-studio-action or data-studio-target per card, or card-scoped view-details + appointment id)
Unexplained target loss or missing View Details blocks PAGE FINAL PASS
Do not treat Legacy readinessPass=false as React FAIL — this file is pre-migration evidence only
